description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the Workflows/MergeRequest-Pipelines.gitlab-ci.yml template and uses the alpine Docker image as the default image. Define three stages in order: test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add a shellcheck job that runs on the koalaman/shellcheck-alpine image and executes 'shellcheck ./build.sh' followed by 'shellcheck -e SC2034 -s bash translations/*'. In the build stage add a build_page job that runs 'apk add --update bash gzip gettext' then 'bash ./build.sh', and always uploads the 'public' directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs 'ls public', publishes the 'public' directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and only runs when the commit branch equals the default branch.
